sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n27843" key="do/kana" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δόκᾰνα</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τά</gen>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">δοκός</etym>) at Sparta, <sense id="n27843.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">two upright parallel bars</tr_> joined towards each end (as symbols of the Dioscuri), <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.478a</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
